bird.name: 白尾丽蜂鸟
bird.summary: 白尾丽蜂鸟（台湾作白尾翡翠蜂鳥，学名：Microchera chionura），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 白尾丽蜂鸟体重约3克，翼长约49.5毫米，嘴峰长约17.7毫米，喙宽度约1.5毫米，喙厚度约1.7毫米，跗蹠长约4.4毫米，尾长约28.6毫米。白尾丽蜂鸟在其分布区内为留…

locations.name: Talamancan montane forests

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: 白尾丽蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It is native to the Talamancan montane forests.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/hummingbirds/ |title=Hummingbirds |website=IOC World Bird List |version =v 12.2 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1= F

relations.subject: 白尾丽蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It inhabits the edges and interior of moist to humid montane forest and secondary forest, and also plantations and gardens

relations.subject: 白尾丽蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It inhabits the edges and interior of moist to humid montane forest and secondary forest, and also plantations and gardens
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 白尾丽蜂鸟
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered locally common in some protected areas, but "deforestation [is] extensive and continuing in at least the lower part of its altitudinal range"
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
